note: Day 2C corrected replay after BLOCKER 1 (final-output lineage), BLOCKER 2 (operand grounding), BLOCKER 3 (branch-level union provenance). Implemented variant = A (RC5 obligation-dominance only; candidate_scorer.py reverted, identical to HEAD).
method: static offline replay of captured candidate pools through select_best; baseline (obligation disabled) vs patched (RC5-only). The live per-query checklist/contract is NOT reconstructed offline, so some reconstructed baselines diverge from the live trace (proxy mismatch). Any patched candidate that is semantically WRONG in a protected-correct case is counted as a regression regardless of proxy mismatch.

protected_changed_cases.question: For each player, calculate average training load divided by average recovery score.
protected_changed_cases.live_sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.full_name, AVG(pts.training_load) / AVG(pts.recovery_score) AS avg_training_load_div_recovery
FROM players p
JOIN player_training_stats pts ON p.player_id = pts.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.full_name
HAVING AVG(pts.recovery_score) > 0
protected_changed_cases.base_sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.full_name
FROM players p
JOIN player_training_stats pts ON p.player_id = pts.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id
HAVING AVG(pts.training_load) / AVG(pts.recovery_score) IS NOT NULL
protected_changed_cases.patched_sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.full_name, AVG(pts.training_load) / AVG(pts.recovery_score) AS avg_training_load_div_recovery
FROM players p
JOIN player_training_stats pts ON p.player_id = pts.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.full_name
HAVING AVG(pts.recovery_score) > 0
protected_changed_cases.manual_verdict_patched_sql: patched #7 projects AVG(training_load)/AVG(recovery_score) = the requested ratio and equals the live-correct selection; the reconstructed baseline (#6, ratio only in HAVING) diverged from live because the live checklist is not reproduced offline. Not a regression.

cases.question: Show each department with its annual budget per enrolled department student.
cases.live_sql: SELECT "departments"."department_id", "departments"."department_name", "departments"."annual_budget", SUM("programs"."current_enrollment") AS "total_enrolled_students" FROM "departments" INNER JOIN "programs" ON "departments"."department_id" = "programs"."department_id" GROUP BY "departments"."department_id", "departments"."department_name", "departments"."annual_budget"
cases.patched_sql:
SELECT department_name, annual_budget, student_count, annual_budget * 1.0 / student_count AS budget_per_student
FROM departments
WHERE student_count > 0
cases.manual_verdict_patched_sql: projects annual_budget/student_count (budget per enrolled department student)

cases.question: Show each instructor with their salary per year of service since the hire date.
cases.live_sql:
SELECT first_name, last_name, salary, hire_date
FROM instructors
cases.patched_sql:
SELECT first_name, last_name, salary, hire_date, CAST(salary AS REAL) / (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', hire_date)) AS salary_per_year_of_service
FROM instructors
WHERE strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', hire_date) > 0
cases.manual_verdict_patched_sql: projects salary / years-of-service-since-hire (salary per year of service)

cases.question: Show each department with annual budget per doctor.
cases.live_sql:
SELECT 
    d.department_name, 
    d.annual_budget, 
    d.doctor_count
FROM departments d
GROUP BY d.department_id
HAVING d.doctor_count > 0
cases.patched_sql:
SELECT department_name, annual_budget, doctor_count, annual_budget * 1.0 / doctor_count AS annual_budget_per_doctor
FROM departments
WHERE doctor_count > 0

cases.question: List policy identifiers that appear either in patient records or billing claims.
cases.live_sql: SELECT DISTINCT "insurance_policies"."policy_id" FROM "billing_claims" INNER JOIN "insurance_policies" ON "billing_claims"."policy_id" = "insurance_policies"."policy_id" INNER JOIN "patients" ON "billing_claims"."patient_id" = "patients"."patient_id"
cases.patched_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT policy_id
FROM insurance_policies
WHERE policy_id IN (SELECT policy_id FROM patients)
   OR policy_id IN (SELECT policy_id FROM billing_claims)
cases.manual_verdict_patched_sql: IN(patients) OR IN(billing_claims): true either/union membership

cases.question: List department identifiers that appear either in doctors or appointments.
cases.live_sql: SELECT DISTINCT "doctors"."department_id", "appointments"."department_id" FROM "doctors" INNER JOIN "appointments" ON "doctors"."doctor_id" = "appointments"."doctor_id"
cases.patched_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT department_id FROM doctors
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT department_id FROM appointments
cases.manual_verdict_patched_sql: UNION of doctors and appointments department_id: true union

cases.question: List team identifiers that appear either in contracts or transfers.
cases.live_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.team_id
FROM teams t
JOIN contracts c ON t.team_id = c.team_id
JOIN transfers tr ON t.team_id = tr.to_team_id OR t.team_id = tr.from_team_id
cases.patched_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.team_id
FROM teams t
JOIN contracts c ON t.team_id = c.team_id
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT t.team_id
FROM teams t
JOIN transfers tr ON t.team_id = tr.from_team_id
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT t.team_id
FROM teams t
JOIN transfers tr ON t.team_id = tr.to_team_id
cases.manual_verdict_patched_sql: teams JOIN contracts UNION teams JOIN transfers: entity-join union over both sources

detail.why: offline baseline already picks a correct candidate; live selected a wrong one (proxy)
EXCEPT/set-difference grain — out of derived/either scope
in the day2_targeted pool the correct candidates carry a bare-GROUP-BY demoted by a separate eligibility gate (note: in the 500-run pool this test recovers)
correct candidates demoted by a separate bare-GROUP-BY eligibility gate

ablation_A_B_C.note: A=RC5-only (implemented), B=RC5+reward-only, C=RC5+reward+penalty. Identical on all 9 class-A and on protected/incorrect pools (scorer reverted -> B/C collapse to A). RC5-only chosen: smallest, no scorer penalty.
